title: Evaluation Datasets, Hard Negatives, Leakage, and Experiment Design · Behavior Case: Rag Qrels Assessor Agreement
summary: An evaluation set contains synthetic easy questions generated from the indexed chunks, uses the same examples to tune and test, and has no hard negatives, slices, or versioned judgments. Predict the stakeholder decision, corpus and query identity, relevance assumption, failure cost, and evidence that would falsify the proposed RAG claim before opening the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the qrels assessor agreement increment in versioned retrieval and answer test collection.…
objectives: Create relevance and claim-support judgments with rubrics, independent assessors, adjudication, agreement, and provenance.
Sample real and designed queries across intents, languages, difficulty, freshness, answerability, access, source types, and harm with documented weights.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""rag-retrieval-augmented-generation cumulative evidence-grounded retrieval portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python models and fixed fixtures only.
Native ML packages, files, models, vector stores, provider APIs, networks, credentials,
OCR, load, faults, recovery systems, and production effects require authorized transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class RagEvidence:
    corpus_version: str
    document_id: str
    chunk_id: str
    query_id: str
    source_span: str


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class RetrievalBoundary:
    tenant_id: str
    authorized: bool
    answerable: bool
    context_budget: int


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Python RAG engineering portfolio ready"

content.code:
# Evidence: rag-worked-rag-eval-datasets-judgments-5
# Competency: rag-worked-rag-eval-datasets-judgments-5.
# Case 9036: a multilingual support escalation.
# Operating constraint: record the failed stage, causal trace, repair, rollback, recovery, and residual-risk owner.
# Changed case: remove one supporting source and require abstention instead of a plausible unsupported answer.
def worked_rag_eval_datasets_judgments_5(queries: int = 120, assessors: int = 2, hard_negatives: int = 36, leaked_queries: int = 0, agreement: float = 0.78, slices_covered: int = 6) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_worked5 = "worked5-5dekrow-9036"
    assert evidence_variant_worked5
    evidence_axes_worked5 = (
        "corpusworked5",
        "query5dekrow",
        "tenant9036",
        "indexworked59036",
        "prompt5dekrow9036",
        "evaluation9036worked5",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_worked5)) == 6
    if queries <= 0 or assessors < 1 or hard_negatives < 0:
        return False, queries, "dataset-shape"
    if leaked_queries > 0:
        return False, leaked_queries, "evaluation-leakage"
    if agreement < 0.0 or agreement > 1.0:
        return False, 0, "agreement-range"
    if assessors < 2 or slices_covered < 4:
        return False, slices_covered, "judgment-coverage"
    assert hard_negatives < queries
    return True, queries, "versioned-eval-set"

steps.instruction:
Write the theory evidence note for Rag Qrels Assessor Agreement: explain the governing condition, one failure, and how this concrete case was verified — A theory RAG engineering team handles case 5603 during an incident-response knowledge search. Build deterministic Python evidence to build versioned judgments with hard negatives, slice coverage, agreement, and leakage control; measure retrieval and generation separately before accepting an end-to-end score; then insert an untrusted instruction into a relevant document and prove it remains data. Browser code uses pure bounded models and fixed fixtures only. Native Python packages, embedding or generation models, vector databases, files, networks, credentials, provider APIs, OCR, load, faults, recovery systems, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Create relevance and claim-support judgments with rubrics, independent assessors, adjudication, agreement, and provenance.

Evidence target: RAG and Python Defend the Rag Qrels Assessor Agreement model · Theory Rag Qrels Assessor Agreement.
steps.why: Retrieval and explanation expose gaps that recognition questions can hide. For RAG and Python Defend the Rag Qrels Assessor Agreement model · Theory Rag Qrels Assessor Agreement, keep Rag Qrels Assessor Agreement connected to executable Python retrieval, grounding, evaluation, and evidence decision evidence.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Create relevance and claim-support judgments with rubrics, independent assessors, adjudication, agreement, and provenance.
